overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, beginning in a covered walkway with a food stall, transitioning through neon-lit plazas and corridors, and ending in a vast open square surrounded by towering skyscrapers with massive digital billboards. The scene features persistent mist, wet reflective surfaces, and vibrant purple neon lighting throughout.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian walkway with a wet reflective floor. A food stall with illuminated displays sits ahead, where two NPCs stand interacting. The area is sheltered from the rain by an overhead glass roof, with modern glass buildings visible to the right.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into an open plaza with wet concrete surfaces reflecting the ambient light. Modern benches and trimmed hedges line the path as the camera turns left, revealing more of the open urban space with illuminated pillars.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow pedestrian path dominated by a massive purple digital billboard wall on the right, casting vibrant colored light onto the wet pavement. The path passes under overhead metal pergola structures with palm trees visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: Entering a vast open plaza with towering skyscrapers visible in the distance. Brightly lit vending machines with anime advertisements line the right side. A pedestrian crosses the path ahead as the camera moves toward the center of the plaza with large digital billboards visible on surrounding buildings.

segments.scene_description: Approaching the heart of the plaza with massive skyscrapers towering overhead. An elevated pedestrian bridge spans across the view ahead, while illuminated tree planters and central fountain structures become visible. The area is dominated by enormous digital billboards covering the surrounding building facades.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered pedestrian walkway into a vast, neon-drenched urban plaza dominated by towering skyscrapers. It begins under a glass roof on a wet reflective floor, passing a glowing food stall and modern glass buildings before emerging into an open plaza with trimmed hedges and illuminated pillars. As the camera turns, the scene shifts toward a narrow path where a massive purple digital billboard casts vibrant light across the pavement and under metal pergola structures. The environment then expands into a wide square lined with anime-themed vending machines, moving past pedestrians toward the city center. Finally, the view opens completely to reveal an elevated pedestrian bridge and central fountains, all dwarfed by enormous digital billboards covering the surrounding skyscraper facades.
